programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Beautiful Shade of Death
programme.desc: When police discover the lifeless bodies of Sophia Gerardo, four children and a house cat, they suspect ritualistic mass murder. But Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers a reality far more frightening.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Secret Life
programme.desc: After Lourdes Riddle is found strangled to death in the trunk of her car, homicide detective Joe Kenda follows the trail through a twisting maze of military and cultural secrets.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Woof and Wheels
programme.desc: People and their dogs descended on a local PETCO to meet producers in the hopes of a session with Cesar Millan. Meet two of the problem pooches. Can Cesar dial down the bad behavior of these terrors?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tenacious B
programme.desc: A French Bulldog is anxious around other dogs, and a Vizsla is afraid of cars. Can Cesar help one dog improve his social skills and steer the other's behavior toward the fast lane?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Blackjack & Memphis
programme.desc: Two pit bulls adopted together, turn on each other. Cesar is called in to bring these dueling pit bulls back together and stop their raging dog aggression.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Snickers and Maury
programme.desc: After being attacked by another dog, Snickers has become aggressive with both dogs and humans. Can previously unadoptable Maury get a second chance?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jonbee, Hudson & Violet, and Buford
programme.desc: A ferocious stray Jindo in desperate need of rescue, a Great Dane wreaks havoc on house and home, a boxer mourns the death of a beloved mate.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Red Zone
programme.desc: Two new sibling dogs fight over everything, from food to toys. Facing the possibility of giving up one of the pooches, Cesar travels south to end the civil war between the two dueling pit bulls.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bear & Angel and Lorelei
programme.desc: Two German Shepherds develop an aggressive relationship when they begin going to day care. Then a miniature Schnauzer begins to bark and nip at her owner’s grandchildren.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: How to Raise the Perfect Dog
programme.desc: Cesar shows what it takes to raise four young puppies with different breed-related traits and how the importance of setting boundaries and rules at an early age can lead to a well behaved dog.
programme.sub-title: How to Raise the Perfect Dog

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Scrawny & Lola
programme.desc: Scrawny, one of nine Yorkies, is Allen’s favorite, but attacks anyone that comes near. Lola, a Dalmatian, barks at everything. Find out how Cesar reestablishes control in both homes.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Army Brats
programme.desc: At an army base, Cesar helps an Australian shepherd scared of men in uniform and a Shetland shepherd who barks non-stop when planes fly overhead.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lotus, Rocco, Hootie
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace in a spiritual home after Lotus doesn’t live up to his tranquil name; A lesson on keeping dogs safe from venomous wildlife; The return of Hootie.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Made in Japan, Lawnmower Licker
programme.desc: Marley, a neglected Shiba Inu from Japan, develops aggression towards dogs and people. Piper, a Wire Fox Terrier obsessively tries to get to and lick the lawnmower engine.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cotton, Ricky, and Lila & Duke
programme.desc: An American Eskimo watchdog who takes his role too far; a Shibu Inu with a mean streak; a boxer who was attached by another dog one day in the park, and has since become more aggressive.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: India, Jagger, and Axl
programme.desc: A Manchester Terrier attacks family members, bikes, skateboards, and visiting guests. Jagger needs to learn how to take a walk without wreaking havoc. Cesar tries to rehabilitate an ocean-phobic dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Baby Girl
programme.desc: Suzie Dove Miles, a "cat whisperer," is set on getting a fearful Doberman mix at a shelter. Suzie has tried many of Cesar's exercises with Baby Girl, but needs Cesar’s expertise to help Baby Girl become a real dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.
programme.sub-title: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You

programme.title: Baywatch: In Deep
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch: Heat Wave
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Second Wave
programme.desc: Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Baywatch: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: Hobie overhears his divorcing parents arguing and boats away to a deserted island with two friends, only to have their boat drift away, leaving them stranded on the island with modern day pirates!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After their plane crashes, two robbers attempt to retrieve their suitcase full of stolen money from the ocean. Meanwhile, Mitch and Gayle go to court over custody of Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Drowning Pool
programme.desc: A wealthy older man drowns under suspicious circumstances in front of Jill Riley's tower. Jill endures the pain of losing her first victim, becoming obsessed with unraveling whether his death was an accidental drowning or murder.

programme.title: Baywatch: Rookie School
programme.desc: While housesitting for Craig and Gina, Eddie takes in a runaway whose life is threatened by her mobster boyfriend. Meanwhile, Trevor enters Baywatch rookie school to become a certified LA County lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch: Cruise Ship
programme.desc: Eddie warns Shauni that her new boyfriend Andrew is not a good guy. She ignores Eddie until Andrew gives her a black eye. Meanwhile, Craig and Mitch must stop an out of control party boat before it crashes into the crowded Santa Monica pier.

programme.title: Baywatch: Cretin of the Shallows
programme.desc: Several people are murdered at the beach by a mysterious man in ghoulish make-up and Eddie is knocked unconscious by what he describes as a "cretin." Eddie's report is met with skepticism until the identity of the killer is dramatically revealed.

programme.title: Baywatch: Shelter Me
programme.desc: During a tropical storm, Eddie and Shauni take refuge in the Pomeroy's loft, turning a cold night into the start of a hot romance. In the downpour, two escaped convicts shoot Garner, then break into Baywatch headquarters and take everyone hostage.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Reunion
programme.desc: Craig gets jealous when Mitch reunites with his and Craig’s old flame. Meanwhile, Eddie buys a classic Mustang for cheap, only to get arrested for possession of a stolen car.

programme.title: Baywatch: Armored Car
programme.desc: Jill teams up with Trevor to win a beach volleyball tournament, but all she really wants is to beat her former lover's team. Eddie and Shauni team up to rescue a young girl trapped in an armored car that topples off the pier into the ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch: Home Cort
programme.desc: Mitch gets a surprise visit from his old, mischievous Navy S.E.A.L. buddy and ex-Baywatch lifeguard, John Cort, adding serious problems in their already complicated relationship. And Shauni and Jill fight a battle of the sexes against a shady vendor.

programme.title: Baywatch: We Need a Vacation
programme.desc: Craig, Cort and Eddie take a road trip to Mexico, but their vacation south of the border turns ugly when they tangle with an angry American tourist. Meanwhile, Captian Thorpe becomes Mitch's uninvited house guest. Hobie develops a crush on Shauni.

programme.title: Baywatch: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Cort and Eddie train lifeguards at a water park, but someone is vandalizing the waterslides, putting people's lives in danger. Meanwhile, Captain Thorpe wants Shauni fired for posing in a provocative calendar.

programme.title: Baywatch: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: Eddie and Cort happen upon an illegal gambling ship. Meanwhile, Mitch begins to spend more time with Hobie's English teacher – a liaison that embarrasses Hobie beyond belief.

programme.title: Baywatch: Eclipse
programme.desc: After losing his rookie partner in the mysterious rescue of what he thinks is a ghost, Eddie gets unwittingly caught up in a 70-year-old legend. Meanwhile, Hobie attempts to help a friend find a new home for her dog.

programme.title: Baywatch: Shark Derby
programme.desc: A local restaurateur puts up a $25,000 bounty for the largest shark caught during the weekend's Shark Derby he's sponsoring. To attract more sharks, he illegally chums the waters, drawing hundreds of sharks uncommonly close to shore.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Big Race
programme.desc: Cort promises to come up with $10,000 for a nursing home, but he needs Mitch and Craig's help to compete in a water-skiing race with a big cash prize. Shauni’s traumatic fear of the ocean after Jill’s death threatens her future with Baywatch.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Connie, Positive I.D., Trucker, Cook Out, The New House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Rocket
programme.desc: A top-secret rocket is compromised when one of the scientists runs into gambling debts. Peter heads out on a desperate search for the missing rocket.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: The Last Man on Earth
programme.desc: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Bride Possessed
programme.desc: Matt Conroy is startled when on their honeymoon his wide-eyed, Louisiana-drawling wife Sally suddenly becomes a determined and demanding woman with no accent who denies even knowing him.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Night of April 14th
programme.desc: A young Englishwoman is suddenly wracked by dreams of drowning in the ocean. She is stunned when her fiancée tells her that he has prepared a surprise honeymoon trip for them--they're sailing to New York on the passenger liner Titanic.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Emergency Only
programme.desc: A skeptic has his beliefs tested when events begin to unfold as a psychic had predicted.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Dark Room
programme.desc: A female photojournalist on assignment in France takes an apartment and begins to work with a somewhat mysterious male model.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Twelve Hours to Live
programme.desc: After her husband storms out of the house following an argument, his wife begins having visions of him in terrible danger.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Epilogue
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic returns to his family from an extended stay in rehabilitation. His sobriety is put to the test, as are his beliefs in the supernatural, when his son is trapped in a cave-in.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Dream
programme.desc: In 1940, a fearful Britain awaits invasion by Nazi forces. A husband and his wife, separated by their wartime assignments, suddenly dream that each is in danger, and both try frantically to see if their dream has come true.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Premonition
programme.desc: Debbie is haunted by the fear of her own demise at the hands of a chandelier in her home.

programme.title: Drag Me to Hell
programme.desc: Christine Brown is an ambitious but kind hearted loan officer with a charming boyfriend. But when a powerful curse placed on her by the enraged pensioner, Christine is given just three days before she will apparently be literally dragged to Hell.

programme.title: Backtrack
programme.desc: Psychologist Peter Bower's life is thrown into turmoil when he discovers that the patients he has been seeing are the ghosts of people who died twenty years ago.

programme.title: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: A trip into the mountains of West Virginia for a weekend of hiking turns into a bloody horror fest.

programme.title: Apartment 1BR
programme.desc: In this spine-chilling slice of horror, a woman discovers that her dream apartment isn’t everything she hoped for.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: The Dark Oracle comic returns with a vengeance and the Stone twins, Cally and Lance are more at risk than ever.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: The comic predicts that a red sports car will get into a terrible accident and when Cally's new crush, Emmett shows up at school with the very same car, Cally is horrified.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Evil Sage has taken real Sage's place and Lance and Cally are shocked when this new, uncensored Sage devastates Lance by hooking up with Vern.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance is playing an online role-playing game 24/7 and even Dizzy thinks he's out of control. A staged intervention fails utterly and Lance is back at the keyboard.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance and Cally find themselves the unwitting hosts of a house party that goes completely out of control.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: I, Bob
programme.desc: When an efficiency expert comes to assess the Inner City Dental Clinic, Bob gets side shifted out of a job.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Fly on the Wall
programme.desc: Feeling belittled by his family, Bob jumps at the chance to be the subject of a fly on the wall documentary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A New Life
programme.desc: At a creepy chiropodist social night, Bob and Margaret encounter a couple who are rapturous about the new planned community where they now live.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Player
programme.desc: Bob attends a personal finance seminar to help him get his hopeless financial house in order.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Foxxy vs. the Board of Education
programme.desc: Foxxy challenges the Board of Education, and Spanky and Xandir embark on a sham marriage for insurance.
programme.sub-title: Foxxy vs. the Board of Education

programme.title: Drawn Together: Little Orphan Hero
programme.desc: Captain Hero delves into his origins, while the housemates go into suicide business.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Clum Babies
programme.desc: Wooldoor discovers the healing powers of his bodily fluids. Ling-Ling finds love.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Captain Hero's Marriage Pact
programme.desc: Captain Hero and Wooldoor battle over Unusually Flexible Girl, and Foxxy has a run-in with Foxxy 5.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Ghostesses in the Slot Machine
programme.desc: The housemates appease the spirits of dead Native Americans. Clara seeks her daddy's approval.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Super Nanny
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Captain Girl
programme.desc: The death of Captain Girl forces Captain Hero to fight crime and grief solo. Toot adopts a baby.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Xandir and Tim, Sitting In a Tree ...
programme.desc: The roommates take on Entertainment Weekly after a bad review. Captain Hero explores homosexuality.
programme.sub-title: Xandir and Tim, Sitting In a Tree ...

programme.title: Drawn Together: A Tale of Two Cows
programme.desc: Wooldoor makes a bovine friend in Live Action Forest as Toot heads to a reunion with Xandir.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Alzheimer's That Ends Well
programme.desc: Clara appears on "Extreme Vaginal Makeover"; demented Toot gets committed by her roommates.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: On the Case: A Terrible Secret
programme.desc: A bed sheet may prove to be the key to solving the murder of a 13-year-old girl who is found strangled on a riverbank.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A nine year old girl scout disappears while delivering cookies to a neighbor.

programme.title: On the Case: What Happened to Sarah
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl's mysterious runaway note raises difficult questions for police. Had she really left home on her own or had someone close to her pieced together writing from her journals to cover up an unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is murdered the evidence points detectives to a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case: The East Area Rapist
programme.desc: A sexual sadist known as the East Area Rapist terrorizes California and its law enforcement officers for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: Followed Home
programme.desc: A mother of three is found shot to death inside the trunk of her car, just steps from her home.

programme.title: On the Case: A Daughter's Quest
programme.desc: Victoria Baker was born with visual impairments and put up for adoption. When Victoria became an adult, she never imagined that her nearly 10-year-old quest for her biological mother would ultimately involve her in a heartbreaking murder investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: A Knock on the Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered in the bedroom of her home. The only witness was her five year old son. Would he be able to help police solve the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: A Secret to Kill For
programme.desc: A Canadian Air Force officer's wife finds calls 911, saying she found her husband's body face down in the bushes outside their home. Had he been attacked after a late-night errand.

programme.title: On the Case: A Thin Disguise
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger ambushes a family as they pull into their driveway. Could the memories of a five year old girl be the key to solving the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger Among Us
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Velda Rumfelt's disappearance in Brentwood, Missouri, in 1977 marked the beginning of a tragic, decades long mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger's Knock
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a house fire they discover a woman shot and killed inside. Police must unlock the mystery of who started the blaze to solve the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: When a young teacher fails to show up for work, her principal goes looking for her at her home, where he makes a shocking discovery. The case would go cold until DNA technology helps police track down her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Idaho Falls
programme.desc: Reeda Roundy and Betty Gray are found murdered in Roundy's home, along with a message written in blood, saying `Satan Loves You'. Detectives piece together the stunning truth behind the murders with insights provided by the victims' families.

programme.title: On the Case: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: A woman is at first thought to be the victim a deadly hit-and-run, until police find the car that killed her nearby, and it turns out to be her own.

programme.title: On the Case: For Love and Duty
programme.desc: After a father discovers his 23 year old daughter murdered in her bed, a dedicated investigator spends more than 30 years chasing her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: In the Wind
programme.desc: A daughter's quest to see her birth mother's murder solved is complicated when police discover the prime suspect is in the wind.

programme.title: On the Case: Haunting Memories
programme.desc: Twenty-year-old college student Kim Montelaro goes missing from a mall parking lot, then her lifeless body is found in a ravine five miles from the mall; investigators piece together the timeline of Montelaro's last moments alive and crack the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 2
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On the Case.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E14 - Beware Of Dog
programme.desc: The crew bring aboard an alien tracker to remove some creatures that came aboard hidden in some cargo.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E14 - Beware Of Dog

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E15 - Won't Get Fooled Again
programme.desc: Crichton has returned to Earth. Or has he always been on Earth all this time? People from his past and present appear.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E15 - Won't Get Fooled Again

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E16 - The Locket
programme.desc: A temporal distortion traps Aeryn and John on a planet's surface, where they live out the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Crais and Talyn return. The crew are put on trial for an attack that Talyn made on an alien ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari
programme.desc: A Nebari group comes aboard Moya and attempts to mind cleanse everyone using a drug. Pilot and Rygel are the only two who can resist the effects.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E19 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 1: A Not So Simple Plan
programme.desc: D'Argo finally gets a lead on his son, Jothee. He will do anything to get him back, but Jothee will be sold as a slave.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E19 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 1: A Not So Simple Plan

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: After six years in a coma following a near-fatal car accident, Johnny Smith awakens to find he has the gift of second sight and uses his psychic powers to help solve a serial murder case.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: What It Seems
programme.desc: Johnny uses his psychic powers to help solve a serial murder case.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Quality of Life
programme.desc: Johnny Smith gains trust in his powers after they enable him to save a star high school athlete from a life-threatening heart condition.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Enigma
programme.desc: In helping an old man find his long lost love, Johnny Smith falls in love with the woman himself through visions he has of her in her youth.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Unreasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Johnny Smith is called to serve on a jury and uses his powers to uncover the real facts in the case.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: Spawn of the Atom
programme.desc: From the conclusion of World War II thru the 1950s and beyond, people have been fascinated by -- and frightened of -- the atom bomb and its horrible power. So naturally, it has become a regular subject for sci-fi films.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: U.F.O.s
programme.desc: Swamp gas? Airplanes? Secret government weapons? Or are they really from "out there"? Here's a look at all the sci-fi flicks that have concerned themselves with flying saucers.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: Sci-Fi Stars
programme.desc: In the science fiction universe, there are the stars that astronauts travel to and then there are stars like John Agar, Ken Tobey, Richard Carlson, Charlton Heston, and so many others. Take a look back at the work of the latter.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Dead Man's Hollow: Nishan Bakunts
programme.desc: In 2002, an off-duty fireman discovered a body in a field charred beyond all recognition. All the police knew was that the man had died a brutal death, having been stabbed repeatedly, shot in the head, and drenched in petrol before being set alight.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.
programme.sub-title: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rolf Harris
programme.desc: Rolf Harris became famous for his artwork and music, even painting a portrait of the Queen for the jubilee. But it all came crumbling down in August 2013 when he was accused of 12 assaults on girls as young as eight years old between 1968 and 1986.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Omagh Bombing
programme.desc: Survivors, victims' relatives and former detectives reflect on the Real IRA car bomb that killed 29 people in Omagh, Northern Ireland in 1998.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Keland Hill
programme.desc: Tiffany and Keland Hill were military veterans with a shining service history. But while Tiffany still lived to serve, Keland lived to control, stalk and terrorise his wife. He was extremely violent, but no one predicted his final act of brutality.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Faria Khan
programme.desc: After leaving an arranged marriage she claimed was abusive, Faria Khan could have moved on. But she wouldn’t be satisfied until estranged husband Nawajid was dead. And she knew exactly who to ask to help her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo
programme.desc: At the age of 16, Sana Muhammad had an arranged marriage to Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo, a man almost twice her age. She managed to escape the unhappy relationship and found new love, but Ramanodge decided she would never get to enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran
programme.desc: When Chris Regan started dating coworker Kelly Cochran, he knew she was married. But he had no idea of the wedding day pact she had made with husband Jason. Chris had become entangled in a love triangle that would see two people lose their lives.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ricardo Godinho
programme.desc: Aliny and Ricardo Godinho had four children and a relationship history that spanned 17 years. While Aliny put her kids at the centre of everything she did, for Ricardo they were a morbid obsession, and one that would lead to a shocking, brutal crime.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Omagh Bombing
programme.desc: Survivors, victims' relatives and former detectives reflect on the Real IRA car bomb that killed 29 people in Omagh, Northern Ireland in 1998.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Paranormal Mysteries: A woman is terrorised by an invisible attacker and a mother undergoes a violent and demonic transformation.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 14
programme.desc: Alien Gods of Egypt. Experts scrutinise the engineering behind the Egyptians' Sphinx and pyramids. Could this advanced civilisation have received extra-terrestrial help?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 12
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Ancient Ice Zombies
programme.desc: Thirty World War II aircraft all crashed in the same spot on the Greenland Ice sheet, causing experts to wonder if they all fell victim to the Arctic’s Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series investigates curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Revenge Of The Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Canadian divers spot an object that may solve a Cold War nuclear mystery. A mummified businessman is found atop Mexico’s highest peak. In Iceland, a cave said to be home to a fire giant is investigated. Mummified penguins are found in Antarctica.

programme.title: Diana: The Royal Truth
programme.desc: A captivating first hand account of the life of one of the most iconic figures of the 20th century, Diana Princess of Wales, by the man who lived through it all. From innocent dreamer to divorced change-bringer the turbulent life of Diana was rocked th...

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Harry, fifth in line to the throne, finally announced his engagement to American actress Ms Meghan Markle on November 27th 2017. #Mexit

programme.title: Inside Royalty: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Princess Diana admitted that her marriage had been a bit crowded with Camilla Parker Bowles as the other woman in her husband’s life.

programme.title: Inside Royalty: The Clothes Show
programme.desc: Behind the image of Princess Diana as one of the world’s most photographed women is a revealing story of glamour, sex and perfection.

programme.title: Inside Royalty: The Good Life
programme.desc: What happens when a Princess and a Duchess set about spending their husband’s money?

programme.title: Inside Royalty: The Family Jewels
programme.desc: The Queen’s priceless diamonds, sapphires, emeralds, and rubies far outshine any other jewellery collection in the modern world.

programme.title: Kate A Young Queen in Waiting
programme.desc: Kate Middleton, together with her husband Prince William, is leading the British monarchy out of a period of considerable difficulty. She knows that she will one day be Queen. She understands the dignity of that role at the centre of the British nation.

programme.title: Kate Middleton: Working Class to Windsor
programme.desc: Wife, mother, duchess; a journey from working class to Windsor. Kate Middleton’s rise to royalty and influences of international intrigue and admired the world over.

programme.title: Prince William: Destiny
programme.desc: Destiny goes beyond the Royal love affair and explores destiny in relation to the Royal Family.

programme.title: Princes of the Palace
programme.desc: Discover the lives of the British Royal Family's princes and their importance to the Royal House of Windsor. Profiling Princes Phillip, Charles, William, Harry and young Prince George.

programme.title: Princess Diana The Quiet Revolution
programme.desc: No one in history has ever been so universally adored as Diana, Princess of Wales. In her short life she captivated the world with her beauty, charm and limitless compassion.

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth II: Reign Supreme
programme.desc: Reign Supreme is a historical time line, which, chronicles the life of Elizabeth II with a focus on her enduring reign, public image, private life and events since her coronation.

programme.title: Royal Jewels
programme.desc: The Royal Jewels truly represent the mystery and majesty of Monarchy on display, with the Imperial State Crown itself featuring no less than 2,800 diamonds.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Spare Heirs
programme.desc: The royal children who will never taste the ultimate job - of being a King or Queen of England. From Princess Margaret, who was destined to live and die in her sister's considerable shadow, to Prince Harry, who is making himself universally popular.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: For King and Country
programme.desc: When Edward VIII abdicated, his younger brother, George, suddenly became king and 'inherited' the second world war. The father of Britain's present queen, joined forces with Winston Churchill to stand firm against Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: The Man Who Would be King
programme.desc: Prince William is seen as the 'future' of the British monarchy. The heir to the throne who surveys say most people want to see succeed his grandmother, Queen Elizabeth. Why has William become so popular?
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Would be King

programme.title: Royal Secrets: First Steps
programme.desc: Britain's royal babies used to be born and raised behind closed palace gates. Today, they are part and parcel of the commercialisation of Britain's Royal Family. Not so long ago, access to royal babies was restricted and they didn't even go to school

programme.title: Royal Secrets: An Extraordinary Queen
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II is the world's oldest monarch and Britain's longest serving Queen. This episode explores the secret of the woman who never expected to become a Queen.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Edward & Mrs Simpson
programme.desc: The love affair that enthralled the world and brought down a King. The true story of the romance that cost Edward VIII his throne and defined Britain's modern Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Royal Wives
programme.desc: Through the ages they have come to define their Royal husbands behind the scenes. But, in the modern world the royal wives are expected to become part of the family ‘firm'. What is the secret of being a good Royal 'wife'?

programme.title: Royal Secrets: The Royal Mistress
programme.desc: Camilla Parker Bowles was famously referred to as 'the third person' in the marriage of Charles and Diana. Her long standing affair with the heir to the throne made her one of the most famous Royal mistresses in history.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: The People's Princess
programme.desc: Princess Diana became the People's Princess, but her marriage to the heir to the throne, Prince Charles, was a largely loveless affair that saw Diana fighting the royal family she had married into.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Born to be King
programme.desc: Prince Charles is now the longest 'serving' heir to the British throne in history. He fears that he may never inherit the role he was born to. The Queen's son stands accused of interfering and meddling in British life and the politics of a nation.

programme.title: Royals And Their Pets
programme.desc: The Royal family has always had a very special relationship with their pets: from the lapdog who hid under Mary, Queen of Scots' skirts at her execution to Caesar, King Edward VII's terrier who took precedence over 9 Kings at his masters' State Funeral.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Guildford
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey on a quest to find dream homes for two sets of frustrated house hunters. Two very different budgets and briefs but with the property market raging it looks like they've taken on double the trouble.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Bucks
programme.desc: With both sets of house hunters determined to have it all, Kirstie and Phil are going to have to use all the tricks of the trade if they're going to help them move forward and hopefully into the house of their dreams!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The contestants must each serve one dish of their own creation, that features a spice, on the specially designed menu. Under the watchful eye of John, the amateurs will be challenged like never before to deliver dishes of an exceptional standard.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties

programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Oxfordshire
programme.desc: Our first set of house-hunters are the closest thing to all action heroes Phil and Kirstie have ever had.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: East Midlands
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back and busier than ever, as they attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in an extremely challenging market.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East England
programme.desc: One family is stuck in a house bursting at the seams and the other is stuck in one room at mum and dads. It's a quest for space-and it's up to Kirstie and Phil to make these searches blast off.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil's challenge is to find two very different properties in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are house hunting in Sheffield. Fire fighter Justin and his sales manager wife Deborah have got £250k burning a hole in their back pocket and they're desperate to find the perfect do-up property to settle down in.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton
programme.desc: Despite a slowdown in the housing market, property is still very much headline news, and we love it! But, finding that all singing, all dancing dream home is tougher than ever!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sutton Coldfield
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are kicking-off the series with one hell of a challenge, they're in Birmingham, house hunting for three generations of one family… one big house, for one big, extended family.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties & North Yorks Revist
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Trudi & Steve were moving to be closer to family-whilst in Luton, Zena wanted to get out of mum and dad's.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Harrow, Harts Revisits
programme.desc: Cautious first-time buyers Sundeep and Rupreet in Harrow-and Hitchin mad Hilary and Robin Hertfordshire-both had a serious case of postcode pickiness. But did either get what they wanted in the end?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Devon Revisits
programme.desc: Newlyweds Sam and Jamie needed Kirstie's help to start afresh in a new home. Whilst Geoff and Sharon were making the move to Torquay and needed to find a home big enough for them, their kids, and Sharon's mum!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton, Sussex
programme.desc: A first-time buyer after a perfect pad near the Brighton hot spots and a couple who know exactly what they like-and exactly what they don't...

programme.title: Great British Menu: London and South East Main
programme.desc: Today it's the battle of the main courses, as the chefs from London and the South East – Tom Kerridge, Tristan Welch and Anthony Demetre – face off. Which dish will come out on top?

programme.title: Great British Menu: London and South East Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the chefs from London and the South East – Anthony Demetre, Tom Kerridge and Tristan Welch - to prove they've got what it takes. So which dessert will former champion Jason Atherton think is worthy of The Prince?

programme.title: Great British Menu: London and South East Judging
programme.desc: It's judgment day on Great British Menu. One chef left the competition yesterday and now only two remain to battle it out, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Final Starter
programme.desc: It's the finals of Great British Menu. In today's program, the finalists cook their starters, which will be tasted and scored by the Great British Menu judges, and in a twist to the competition, there's a new addition to the judging panel.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Final Fish
programme.desc: Only 8 chefs remain and they are all determined to get at least one of their dishes through to the banquet. Today they cook their fish dishes for the Great British Menu judges, who are joined by a fourth member to assist them in their decision.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Final Main
programme.desc: It's day 3 of the finals of Great British Menu, when the panel of judges give their verdict on the main courses. 8 of the country's top chefs are competing to cook at a banquet, celebrating the very best local produce from around the British Isles.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Final Dessert
programme.desc: It's dessert day in the finals of Great British Menu and the last chance for the competing chefs to impress the judges and secure a place at the final banquet - a celebration of the very best local produce from across the land.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Banquet
programme.desc: The winners have been announced and this special documentary follows the successful chefs in the run-up to the banquet, as they make the painstaking preparations, for what is one of the most important meals they will ever cook.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North East Starter
programme.desc: It's the battle of the North East chefs – Andrew Pern, Stephanie Moon and Tim Bilton. They kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North East Fish
programme.desc: The chefs from the North East – Tim Bilton, Andrew Pern and Stephanie Moon pull out all the stops with their fish dishes: Seafood Stew, Fish 'Soup' with a toasted Kipper Club Sandwich and hot oak smoked Kilnsey Trout, golden tea cream, and Daleside scraps

programme.title: Great British Menu: North East Main
programme.desc: The chefs from the North East battle it out with their main courses. Stephanie Moon, Andrew Pern, and Tim Bilton are determined to win but which dish will take the poll position?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North East Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from the North East to impress as the one with the lowest total score from across the week will leave the competition today. Tim Bilton, Andrew Pern, and Stephanie Moon deliver their desserts.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North East Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the North East. One chef left the competition and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Northern Ireland Starter
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Northern Ireland chefs – Brian McCann, Chris Bell, and Chris Fearon. All of them are determined to knock out their rivals in the race to the banquet. They kick things off with their starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Northern Ireland Fish
programme.desc: The chefs from Northern Ireland – Chris Fearon, Chris Bell, and Brian McCann pull out all the stops with their fish dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Northern Ireland Main
programme.desc: The chefs from Northern Ireland battle it out with their main courses. Chris Bell, Brian McCann, and Chris Fearon are determined to win but which dish will take the poll position?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Northern Ireland Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from Northern Ireland to impress as the one with the lowest total score from across the week will leave the competition today. Brian McCann, Chris Fearon, and Chris Bell deliver their desserts.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Northern Ireland Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from Northern Ireland. One chef left the competition and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Starter
programme.desc: It's the battle of the North West chefs – Bruno Birkbeck, Johnnie Mountain and Lisa Allen. All of them are determined to knock out their rivals in the race to the banquet. They kick things off with their starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Fish
programme.desc: The chefs from the North West – Lisa Allen, Bruno Birkbeck, and Johnnie Mountain pull out all the stops with their fish dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Main
programme.desc: The chefs from the North West battle it out with their main courses. Johnnie Mountain, Lisa Allen, and Bruno Birkbeck are determined to win but which dish will take the poll position?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from the North West to impress as the one with the lowest total score from across the week will leave the competition. Bruno Birkbeck, Johnnie Mountain, and Lisa Allen deliver their desserts.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from North West. One chef left the competition and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Starter
programme.desc: It's the Central chefs battling it out – Richard Bainbridge, Aktar Islam, and Sue Ellis. Former Great British Menu champion Glynn Purnell will decide which dishes deserve the highest scores.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Tamron Hall's tenacious personality shines through as Bear pushes her to her limits.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts
programme.desc: Movie star Julia Roberts joins Bear on a lifesaving Red Nose Day adventure in Kenya. They're on a two-day trek enduring blistering savannah temperatures.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Actor Michael B. Jordan joins Grylls in Wales where they start their journey by dropping into rough waters off the coast before making their way up the coast and to the top of the mountains for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Hudson
programme.desc: Oscar-nominated actress Kate Hudson goes on a journey with Bear that involves a treacherous mountain range in Italy; Kate shares details of her unique upbringing.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Bear and Super Bowl champion Marshawn Lynch tackle a rugged mountain range that has sharp cliffs and dark chasms; the pair comes face to face with the French Foreign Legion and pursues a wild hog for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Keri Russell
programme.desc: Keri Russell and Bear journey through the Canary Islands; they dine on undigested seeds from a pigeon carcass, use a grappling hook and make a daring escape from a mountain peak using a paraglider; Keri discusses her family and path to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ben Stiller
programme.desc: Ben Stiller travels to Northern Scotland to face the Isle of Skye's rugged mountains. Stiller discusses his background while they navigate slippery terrain, searching for food and clean water.
